title: Workflow backend response (contract/v1)
description: The JSON document the workflow engine writes to stdout in `backend` mode. The engine returns declared outputs only — the full workflow context never crosses the boundary. Vendored identically in sourceplane/orun and sourceplane/torkflow.

contract.description: Contract version echoed by the engine.

status.description: Terminal state of the run. `paused` is reserved for approval gates (WX7).

outputs.description: The workflow's declared spec.outputs, evaluated. A workflow with no declared outputs returns an empty object; raw context is never returned.

steps.description: Structured per-step timeline, sealed by the caller as data.

error.description: Failure detail when status is failed.
